channel.title: per-lc_all_error on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in per-lc_all_error on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog

item.title: How to Fix Linux Perl LC_ALL_ERROR
item.description: How to fix perl LC_ALL ERROR export LANGUAGE=en_US.UTF-8 export LANG=en_US.UTF-8 export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 cat >> /etc/environment <<EOF LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 LANG=en_US.UTF-8 EOF
